nrqlConditions.name: MechCraft API latency p95 alta
nrqlConditions.query: FROM Transaction SELECT percentile(duration, 95) WHERE appName = 'mechcraft-api'

nrqlConditions.name: MechCraft healthcheck com falha
nrqlConditions.query: FROM HealthCheckResult SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE isHealthy = false)

nrqlConditions.name: MechCraft falha no processamento de OS
MechCraft API CPU alta
nrqlConditions.query: FROM K8sContainerSample SELECT average(cpuUsedCores) WHERE clusterName = 'mechcraft-aks' AND podName LIKE 'mechcraft-api-%'

nrqlConditions.name: MechCraft API memoria alta
nrqlConditions.query: FROM K8sContainerSample SELECT average(memoryWorkingSetBytes / 1048576) WHERE clusterName = 'mechcraft-aks' AND podName LIKE 'mechcraft-api-%'
